channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Household items scattered across pavement, 1st May
item.description:
Abandoned household rubbish

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 138, Oglander Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Near 78 harmood street, 1st May
item.description:
Broken branches falling into garden ond pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 80, Harmood Street, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking on double yellows, 1st May
item.description:
Parking on single yellow within restricted hours and on double yellows. This corner is frequently parked on illegally making it difficult for cars to pass

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lancaster Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking on single yellow within restricted hours, 1st May
item.description:
Parking on single yellow within restricted hours

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Armfield Road, Enfield

item.title: Garden furniture o/s 22 Davis Way, Sidcup, 1st May
item.description:
Garden furniture o/s 22 Davis Way, Sidcup - on footway
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Davis Way, North Cray, Greater London

item.title: Office chair and a mirror on path way., 1st May
item.description:
Office chair and a mirror on path way.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manor Road, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street cleaning, 1st May
item.description:
Excessive amount of foliage, small branches and other debris on the pavement and in the gutter outside numbers 39-43 and elsewhere along the road. Would you please arrange for this to be cleared?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Birkbeck Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking in elecric bay, 1st May
item.description:
On April 5th you issued me with a parking ticket for this location. This is in spite of me a) living at this address, b) having a valid resident's permit , c) having a plug-in electric car. This van depicted has been here for four hours.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sandringham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Adjacent to 220 Iverson Road, 1st May
item.description:
The cover is raised and I tripped over on it
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rowntree Close, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Collapsed hoardings blocking whole pavement, 1st May
item.description:
For two days now this has been like this. Exposed nails, massive bits of wood blocking the pavement.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chatsworth Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree pruning, 1st May
item.description:
Tree growth is blocking the pedestrian walkway outside 80B Park Road Beckenham BR3 1QH
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox cub, 1st May
item.description:
Dead fox cub by East Dulwich community centre. Bagged due to child's nursery next door

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 141, Crystal Palace Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large number of lime hire bikes left abandoned, 1st May
item.description:
Large number of lime hire bikes left abandoned on overcrowded parking bay on Haymarket Street opposite Cafe Concerto.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Piccadilly Circus, Covent Garden, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: E-Lime bike Parked Dangerously on Overcrowded Parking Bay, 1st May
item.description:
E-Lime bike Parked Dangerously on Overcrowded Parking Bay might hurt somebody. 164 Piccadilly.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 61, Piccadilly, Mayfair, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: I have mobility problem so it’s very complicated situation at the moment as in front of my home main door there is ca big track parked and it’s been 3 weeks. None comes to collect or drive it.please help me with this situation and clear this track as I am straggling to bring shoping or go out at the moment., 1st May
item.description:
Door number 18 hallbrook way Bromley

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Holbrook Way, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped red car,tyres removed, 1st May
item.description:
This car has been here for a very long time,it’s full of rubbish,and collecting rubbish around it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Waring Road, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Kids toy truck 🚚 dumped on pavement, 1st May
item.description:
Medium sized car truck dumped on start Ethlbert Rd / Hengist Rd junction
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ethelbert Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large conifer tree completely covering the lamp post/street light in Mera Drive, 1st May
item.description:
Large conifer tree completely covering the lamp post/street light in Mera Drive - needs cutting back as been a problem for years now. Please can this be looked into as when it's dark you cannot see down that part of the road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mera Drive, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffit on the wall (public facing), 1st May
item.description:
Please cover all this graffiti

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 49, Peckham High Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of glass on the pavement and road on the junction of Mera Drive and Mayplace Road West o/s the shop on the corner, 1st May
item.description:
Lots of glass on the pavement and road on the junction of Mera Drive and Mayplace Road West o/s the shop on the corner - please can this be swept up asap
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 70, Mayplace Road West, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
